title: Anti Spectator Noclip
description: Prevent spectator players from passing through walls
body:
Want to play on a server with your friends but spectator players are seeing too much info by going through walls ?

**Anti Spectator Noclip** is here to fix this problem.

It prevents spectator players from passing through walls.

This is individually adjustable for each player thanks to an "Allow Noclip" effect which allows passing through walls.
